title: Affirm (AFRM) Earnings Call Signals Record Momentum
text:
Affirm (AFRM) Earnings Call Signals Record Momentum

Affirm's latest earnings call indicates record momentum across the business, with strong growth drivers including the Affirm Card, merchant diversification, and improving profitability metrics.

Key Highlights:
- Affirm Card showing significant GMV growth and user adoption
- Merchant portfolio expanding with reduced concentration risk
- Operating margins improving substantially year-over-year
- Company maintaining strong underwriting standards amid growth
- Forward guidance pointing to continued acceleration

The earnings call revealed management's confidence in the company's positioning within the buy-now-pay-later market and its ability to scale while maintaining credit quality.
